title: hieracium crocatum subsp. phrissoides
intro: Hieracium crocatum subsp. phrissoides, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a plant species in the dandelion family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and roots, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function, due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. In herbal medicine, Hieracium crocatum subsp. phrissoides is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and is used to treat a range of ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
